metadata.agency: Technology Agency of the Czech Republic
metadata.program: 13. verejna soutez SIGMA – Dilci cil 5: Centra aplikovaneho vyzkumu

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: Machine Learning; Multimodal AI; Cybersecurity; Autonomous Systems; HPC; Digital Twins; Data-Driven Methods; Biomedical AI; Smart Manufacturing; Construction Technology; Trustworthy AI; Ethical AI

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The project establishes the National Center for Artificial Intelligence (NCUI) as an applied research platform with national and European impact. A consortium of 6 academic, 30+ industrial and state partners will implement 9 interdisciplinary work packages to achieve 5 goals: 1) build NCUI with effective governance, 2) integrate AI subdisciplines with application research, 3) strengthen academia-industry links, 4) consolidate national research capacity, and 5) promote science-for-policy with ethical and social focus. The outcome will be a stronger Czech AI ecosystem, knowledge transfer, and development of trustworthy AI.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Cernocky Jan, prof. Dr. Ing. (DCGM) – research leader Cadik Martin, prof. Ing., Ph.D. (DCGM)
